rule_text: AP EPC contracts may be entrusted to a Government-approved PANEL of firms/agencies based on prescribed eligibility criteria; the empanelment must be REVIEWED at periodicity of NOT MORE THAN 2 YEARS; for EPC works, Limited Tender (from approved panel) OR Open Tender system shall be followed; technical evaluation precedes financial bid evaluation for open category.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Note under Article 51(a) — EPC empanelment provisions
verification_method: For EPC tenders: check approved-panel list date <=2yr old; verify Two-stage technical-then-financial evaluation

rule_text: AP EPC contracts introduce a FIFTH method of execution beyond the traditional four (Article 163): (v) execution by agreement in the form approved by Government for EPC works — articles of agreement, tender notice, and tender documents specifically approved by Government must be used.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, fifth method amendment to Article 163
verification_method: EPC tender contracts must use Government-approved EPC agreement form (not generic Form 9 or PWD format)

rule_text: AP EPC contracts allow MOBILIZATION ADVANCE not exceeding 5% of contract value — payable at prescribed stages of execution; Mobilization advance on NEW MACHINERY at prescribed percentage of new-machinery-value, not exceeding 5% of contract value, is payable against ORIGINAL INVOICES proving the contractor purchased the machinery AFTER agreement-conclusion date.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Note under Article 177 — EPC Mobilisation Advance
verification_method: EPC mobilization advance: <= 5% of contract value (general) AND <= 5% on new machinery (against post-agreement-purchase invoices)

rule_text: AP EPC mobilization advance machinery invoices must be in name of the contractor/firm/joint-venture only; NO mobilization advance is payable on machinery purchased by an individual firm partner in a joint venture; the contractor must submit an UNDERTAKING that they have not obtained any other mobilization advance from Government against the same machinery.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Note under Article 177 — EPC anti-double-claim provisions
verification_method: Check invoice name matches contractor/JV (not individual partner); undertaking-against-double-claim on file

rule_text: AP EPC works measurement: AE/AEE must verify and record (a) 1/3rd of pre-levels taken by EPC agency, (b) 100% levels in cut-off and foundations, (c) 25% of intermediate work-done levels, (d) 100% of final levels recorded by EPC agency; ALL measurements in M-Books issued by EE must be checked to 100% by AEs/AEEs; DEEs, EEs, and SEs must check the above per codal provisions.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Note under Article 175 — EPC measurement protocol
verification_method: EPC tender file should reflect measurement-verification protocol; M-Book audit shows AE/AEE check percentages
